title: Netskope Malware and Threat Detected in Cloud and Web Sessions
spl:
index=casb sourcetype="netskope:events" earliest=-24h
| eval threat=coalesce(malware_name, threat_name, verdict, threat_category)
| where isnotnull(threat) AND threat!="" AND threat!="clean" AND threat!="none"
| stats count by user, app_name, threat, action, policy_name
| sort -count
| head 50
description: Netskope inspects SaaS and web traffic for known malware families, sandbox verdicts, and composite threat scores. Aggregating detections by user and application shows active infections, risky file sharing, and policy effectiveness.
value: Closes the gap between perimeter sandbox appliances and cloud-native workloads where traditional IDS has no visibility.
implementation: Enable full Netskope event logging including threat fields. Install Splunkbase 3808 on search heads. Map `action` values (allow, block, quarantine) to SOC severity. Correlate with endpoint containment status before closing tickets.
visualization: Table (user, app, threat), Timeline (detection burst), Pie chart (action mix).
